exercises.title: BBPSSW Protocol Simulator
tasks: Model Werner states as density matrices
Calculate output fidelity vs input fidelity curve

exercises.title: Iterative Purification Optimizer
tasks: Calculate resource cost (pairs, time, success probability)
Find optimal number of rounds for target fidelity
hints: Include gate errors in realistic model

exercises.title: Noise Model Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze purification under different noise models.
tasks: Implement depolarizing, dephasing, amplitude damping noise
Convert noisy Bell states to Bell-diagonal form
Determine optimal protocol for each noise type
Calculate purification threshold for each model
hints: Bell-diagonal: express as mixture of Bell states
Dephasing favors different strategy than depolarizing

exercises.title: Practical Purification System
exercises.description: Model realistic purification with all imperfections.
tasks: Find parameter requirements for target performance
hints: Gate errors add to noise each round
May need to abort if fidelity drops
